nasb.text: Then God said, “Let the waters below the heavens be gathered into one place, and let the dry land appear”; and it was so.

esv.text: And God said, “Let the waters under the heavens be gathered together into one place, and let the dry land appear.” And it was so.

cnv.text: 神說：“天下的水要聚在一處，使旱地露出來！”事就這樣成了。

ccb.text: 上帝说：“天空下面的水要聚在一处，使干地露出来。”果然如此。

csbs.text: 神说：“让天底下的水聚集到一处，让干处显现。”事情就如此成就了。
